thread-start.name: Classify
tasks: Read the issue body + every prior comment
Call classify_issue with primary type + labels

thread-start.name: Respond
tasks: Branch on the classification (see system prompt)
Bug: repro_record, fix, open PR. Else: one gh_post_comment, stop.

thread-start.name: Follow up
tasks: Read the new comment in full
Apply the change, then gh_post_comment reply
